title: scutellaria nummulariifolia
intro: Scutellaria nummulariifolia, also known as the moneywort or two-rowed skullcap, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria nummulariifolia include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Scutellaria nummulariifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and other herbal practices.
